scripts.help: node -e "const s=require('./package.json').scripts,d={help:'Show this help', 'web:dev':'Run Next.js web app in dev mode (hot reload)','web:build':'Build the web app for production','web:start':'Start the built web app','web:lint':'Lint the web app','shared:build':'Build the @cultuvilla/shared package','shared:test':'Run unit tests in @cultuvilla/shared',build:'Build all workspaces (recursive)',test:'Run unit tests across the repo','test:integration':'Run @cultuvilla/shared integration tests against the emulator','test:rules':'Run firestore.rules e2e tests against the emulator','test:functions':'Run Cloud Functions tests against the emulator','test:emulators':'Run all emulator-backed test suites in sequence'};console.log('\nCultuvilla — pnpm scripts\n');for(const k of Object.keys(s)){console.log('  pnpm '+k.padEnd(20)+'  '+(d[k]||s[k]))}console.log('')"
scripts.typecheck: pnpm shared:typecheck && pnpm web:typecheck && pnpm functions:typecheck
scripts.build: pnpm shared:build && pnpm web:build && pnpm functions:build
scripts.test:functions: node scripts/run-tests-with-emulators.mjs npm --prefix functions run test
scripts.test:emulators: pnpm test:integration && pnpm test:rules && pnpm test:functions
scripts.check: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build
